role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of text and remained within the domain of script analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation density, and climate cues (subtropical/montane).
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed plant types (ferns, broadleaf) and biome characteristics.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure (guardrails, gutters, signs) and standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (camera generation, infrastructure style) to distinguish candidates.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth (Malaysia) by leveraging the regulatory specialist's evidence (the chevron sign) in the tournament stage. The specialists provided high-quality, image-grounded evidence, and the tournament judge correctly prioritized the specific regulatory match over the general landscape similarities that favored Taiwan.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately noted lack of visible text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of steep terrain, dense forest, and concrete gutters match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of ferns and broadleaf canopy are visually supported.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the yellow chevron sign, guardrail, and asphalt are accurate.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Observations about image quality and infrastructure style are consistent with the visual data.
